HomeDestinationsKolbong
West Bengal

Kolbong

The Silent Valley of Pines

Dense pine cathedral where needles carpet the path and fog drifts between towering trunks.

4.2
(42 reviews)
Kalimpong, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
20°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Kolbong is a peaceful village surrounded by dense pine forests, offering solitude and unspoiled natural beauty.

History

A traditional forest village that has preserved its natural heritage.

Altitude

1,550 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Kalimpong, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Nature

Pine Forest

Dense pine and dhupi forests.

Culture

Village Walk

Scenic walks through traditional villages.

KuboVista

Forest Meditation Spot

A quiet spot deep in the pine forest.

Why visit: Perfect for meditation and reflection

Viewpoints

panoramic

Kolbong Viewpoint

Views through the pine trees.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Forest Kitchen

4.1

Local • ₹200-400

Home-cooked meals in the forest.

Cafes

Pine Cafe

4.0

Specialty: Herbal Tea

Tea among the pines.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Forest Produce

Natural products from the forest.

Pine resin productsHerbal medicinesOrganic tea

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Forest Trek

Easy

Trek through the pine forests.

3 hrs
₹600

Suggested Itineraries

Activities

  • • Forest trek
  • • Meditation
  • • Village visit
Lunch, Tea
Taxi from Kalimpong
N/A
₹1,500

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

Frequently Asked Questions

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
